title: ALMA Band 2 line survey of a $z = 3.44$ clumpy strongly-lensed submillimetre galaxy
comment: 8 pages; 5 figures, submitted to MNRAS. Comments warmly welcomed
summary: I present the first molecular line survey of the strongly lensed submillimetre galaxy SPT 0027 ($z = 3.44$) using the new Atacama Large Millimeter/submillimeter Array (ALMA) Band~2 receivers (67 - 116 GHz), whose commissioning completes ALMA's full (sub-)millimetre frequency coverage. The broad spectral coverage from 76 to 111 GHz of the observations simultaneously accesses a large suite of molecular and atomic emission lines. I report the novel detections of the hitherto inaccessible CO (3-2) and HNC (4-3) lines, as well as detections of previously-observed CO (4-3) transitions, the neutral carbon line [CI], HCN (5-4), HCO$^{+}$ (5-4), and HNC (5-4), with fluxes in line with previous observations. The CO spectral line energy distribution and [CI]/CO line ratios indicate highly excited, dense molecular gas with a strong far-ultraviolet radiation field. The dense gas fraction is estimated at $17 \pm 9$ per cent, consistent with other dusty star-forming galaxies selected from wide-area surveys. High-resolution Band 7 continuum imaging reveals a clumpy lensed morphology, with star-forming clumps contributing 30-50 per cent of the total emission. With multiple CO lines accessible across a wide redshift range, ALMA Band 2 is uniquely positioned as the premier tool for robust spectroscopic redshifts at Cosmic Noon and beyond ($z \sim 1$-$6$), a capability that will be further enhanced by the Wideband Sensitivity Upgrade's full-band coverage in fewer tunings.

AI.tldr: 首次对强引力透镜亚毫米星系SPT 0027进行分子谱线巡测，利用ALMA Band 2接收器（67-116 GHz）探测到多个分子和原子发射线，包括首次观测到的CO(3-2)和HNC(4-3)线，揭示了高激发、致密分子气体特性。
AI.motivation: 利用ALMA新Band 2接收器完成ALMA全（亚）毫米波频率覆盖，通过宽频谱覆盖（76-111 GHz）同时获取大量分子和原子发射线，研究高红移星系SPT 0027的分子气体特性，并展示ALMA Band 2在宇宙正午及更远红移（z~1-6）进行稳健光谱红移测量的独特能力。
AI.method: 使用ALMA Band 2接收器（67-116 GHz）对红移z=3.44的强引力透镜亚毫米星系SPT 0027进行分子谱线巡测，观测频段为76-111 GHz，同时探测多种分子和原子发射线，并结合高分辨率Band 7连续谱成像分析星系形态。
AI.result: 首次探测到CO(3-2)和HNC(4-3)线，同时观测到先前已知的CO(4-3)、[CI]、HCN(5-4)、HCO⁺(5-4)和HNC(5-4)线；CO谱线能量分布和[CI]/CO线比表明存在高度激发、致密的分子气体和强远紫外辐射场；致密气体比例估计为17±9%；高分辨率成像显示透镜形态呈团块状，星形成团块贡献总发射的30-50%。
AI.conclusion: ALMA Band 2凭借其宽频覆盖和多个CO线可观测性，成为在宇宙正午及更远红移（z~1-6）进行稳健光谱红移测量的理想工具，这一能力将通过宽带灵敏度升级进一步增强。

recommendation.reason: 该论文聚焦于强引力透镜亚毫米星系SPT 0027的分子谱线巡测，直接涉及强引力透镜、高红移星系、致密气体、分子气体和宇宙正午等核心兴趣主题，且使用ALMA数据，与用户Zotero画像高度匹配。论文内容完全符合用户首要研究领域，属于必读文献。
recommendation.topic_fit: 完美匹配：强引力透镜、高红移星系、致密气体、分子气体、宇宙正午、尘埃星暴星系等主题均与用户兴趣高度一致。
recommendation.method_fit: 完美匹配：使用ALMA Band 2进行分子谱线巡测，结合高分辨率连续谱成像分析透镜形态，方法学与用户常用手段一致。
recommendation.author_fit: 部分匹配：作者Tom J. L. C. Bakx出现在用户核心作者列表中，权重较高。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 高：首次利用ALMA Band 2对强透镜星系进行分子谱线巡测，探测到新谱线并展示其红移测量能力，具有方法学创新。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我利用新的阿塔卡马大型毫米/亚毫米阵列（ALMA）第2波段接收器（67-116 GHz）——其调试完成标志着ALMA实现了完整的（亚）毫米频率覆盖——对强引力透镜亚毫米星系SPT 0027（红移$z = 3.44$）进行了首次分子谱线巡天。观测的宽频谱覆盖范围（76至111 GHz）同时获取了大量分子和原子发射线。我报告了此前无法观测到的CO (3-2)和HNC (4-3)谱线的新探测，以及先前观测到的CO (4-3)跃迁、中性碳谱线[CI]、HCN (5-4)、HCO$^{+}$ (5-4)和HNC (5-4)的探测，其流量与先前观测一致。CO谱线能量分布和[CI]/CO谱线比值表明存在高度激发、致密的分子气体，并伴有强烈的远紫外辐射场。致密气体分数估计为$17 \pm 9$%，与从广域巡天中选出的其他尘埃恒星形成星系一致。高分辨率第7波段连续谱成像揭示了团块状的透镜形态，其中恒星形成团块贡献了总发射的30-50%。凭借在宽红移范围内可观测的多条CO谱线，ALMA第2波段独特地成为在宇宙正午及更远红移（$z \sim 1$-$6$）进行稳健光谱红移测量的首要工具，这一能力将通过宽带灵敏度升级的较少调谐实现全波段覆盖而进一步增强。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，ALMA Band 2凭借其宽频覆盖和多个CO线可观测性，成为在宇宙正午及更远红移（z~1-6）进行稳健光谱红移测量的理想工具，这一能力将通过宽带灵敏度升级进一步增强。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: \color referee2 The Band 2 and 3 spectra, with the Band 2 data shown as a thin blue step graph , the Band 3 data from 2022.1.00172.S and 2022.1.00526.S shown as an offset red step graph , and the Band 3 data from 2015.1.00504.S shown as an offset wide grey step graph . Extending beyond the Band 3 regime, the Band 2 data provide a deep view of spectral lines previously not available to ALMA, including the CO(3–2), HCN(4–3), HCO(4–3) and HNC(4–3) lines. The top part of the figure indicates bright emission lines (from Spilker et al. 2014 ; Hagimoto et al. 2023 ) in the range of ALMA Band 2, with smaller fonts indicating undetected lines, while the larger fonts show the detected lines shown in detail in Figure 3 . The bottom part shows, for good observing conditions (precipitable water vapour of 0.5 mm), the atmospheric transparency and observing windows of ALMA Band 2 and Band 3.
figures.caption_zh: Figure 1: \color referee2 第2波段和第3波段光谱，其中第2波段数据显示为细蓝色阶梯图，来自2022.1.00172.S和2022.1.00526.S的第3波段数据显示为偏移的红色阶梯图，来自2015.1.00504.S的第3波段数据显示为偏移的宽灰色阶梯图。延伸至第3波段范围之外，第2波段数据提供了ALMA此前无法获得的谱线深度视图，包括CO(3–2)、HCN(4–3)、HCO(4–3)和HNC(4–3)谱线。图的上部指示了ALMA第2波段范围内的明亮发射线（来自Spilker et al. 2014 ; Hagimoto et al. 2023 ），较小字体表示未探测到的谱线，而较大字体显示在图3中详细展示的已探测谱线。下部显示了在良好观测条件下（可降水汽0.5 mm），ALMA第2波段和第3波段的大气透过率和观测窗口。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: HST imaging on SPT0027-50 (background) with both the ALMA Band 2 continuum imaging (red thick contours) and higher-resolution Band 7 continuum imaging (thin white contours). The beams of each of the ALMA observations are shown in the bottom left. The lensing morphology of SPT0027-50 is suggested in the Band 2 imaging (as well as previous lower-resolution Band 7 analysis; Spilker et al. 2016 ), with the clumpy lensed nature of SPT0027-50 appearing more apparent in the higher-resolution imaging.
figures.caption_zh: Figure 2: SPT0027-50的HST成像（背景）同时叠加了ALMA第2波段连续谱成像（红色粗等高线）和更高分辨率的第7波段连续谱成像（白色细等高线）。左下角显示了每次ALMA观测的波束。SPT0027-50的透镜形态在第2波段成像中有所体现（以及先前较低分辨率的第7波段分析；Spilker et al. 2016 ），而SPT0027-50的团块状透镜性质在更高分辨率成像中更为明显。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Bright molecular and atomic emission lines within the ALMA Band 2 window at \(z=3.44\) .
figures.caption_zh: Table 1: 在\(z=3.44\)处ALMA第2波段窗口内的明亮分子和原子发射线。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: The spectral lines extracted from the Band 2 data. Per line, the left-hand side panel indicates the moment-0 map of the line (background and black thick contours), while the thin white contours indicate the continuum, and the yellow contours indicate the aperture used for the flux extraction. The right-hand side spectrum is shown as a function of velocity relative to the rest-frame, with the top \(x\) -axis indicating the observed frequency. The filled region indicates the velocity range used for generating the moment-0 map, and the bottom-right values for \(N_{beam}\) and \(\sigma_{cont}\) indicate the criteria for identifying the extraction contours in the data cube (i.e., the yellow contours in the left-hand side image).
figures.caption_zh: Figure 3: 从第2波段数据中提取的谱线。每条谱线左侧面板指示谱线的矩0图（背景和黑色粗等高线），而白色细等高线指示连续谱，黄色等高线指示用于流量提取的光圈。右侧光谱显示为相对于静止系的速度函数，顶部\(x\)轴指示观测频率。填充区域指示用于生成矩0图的速度范围，右下角的\(N_{beam}\)和\(\sigma_{cont}\)值指示在数据立方体中识别提取等高线的标准（即左侧图像中的黄色等高线）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Redshift identification probability as a function of redshift ( \(0\leq z\leq 8\) ) for three ALMA frequency configurations, evaluated against smoothed redshift distributions from the HerBS (Bakx et al. , 2018 , 2020b ) and SPT (Reuter et al. , 2020 ) samples. Orange bars indicate the fraction of sources yielding a single detected spectral line, while blue bars indicate two or more detections. Hatched blue regions denote configurations where even a single line provides an unambiguous redshift identification; hatched orange regions indicate cases where redshift degeneracies persist given a 5 \(\sigma\) uncertainty in \(z_{{phot}}\) . Grey dotted lines show the robust redshift fraction when [C i ] emission is included, and black dashed lines show the improvement expected from refined photometric redshift uncertainties (Bendo et al. , 2023 ) . The three panels correspond to left : the filled Band 3 tuning (Weiß et al. , 2013 ) , which serves as the baseline, middle and right : the Band 2-based configurations that use the WSU with 8 (baseline) and 14 GHz (goal) bandwidths. For the 8 GHz set-up, three tunings are used to cover a contiguous coverage between 107 GHz, while for the 14 GHz, two tunings are sufficient to cover the observed wavelengths between 67 and 115 GHz (Carpenter et al. , 2023 ) . The Band 2 setup extends the accessible redshift space to lower redshifts compared to Band 3-only strategies, while simultaneously increasing the fraction of sources for which two or more lines are detected, directly resolving the redshift degeneracy without requiring follow-up observations. Band 2 enables a higher robust redshift fraction across both the HerBS and SPT redshift distributions.
figures.caption_zh: Figure 4: 针对三种ALMA频率配置，红移识别概率作为红移（\(0\leq z\leq 8\)）的函数，根据HerBS（Bakx et al. , 2018 , 2020b ）和SPT（Reuter et al. , 2020 ）样本的平滑红移分布进行评估。橙色条表示仅检测到一条谱线的源的比例，而蓝色条表示检测到两条或更多谱线的比例。蓝色阴影区域表示即使单条谱线也能提供明确红移识别的配置；橙色阴影区域表示在\(z_{{phot}}\)具有5 \(\sigma\)不确定性的情况下红移简并仍然存在的情况。灰色虚线表示包含[C i]发射时的稳健红移比例，黑色虚线表示通过改进的光度红移不确定性预期得到的改善（Bendo et al. , 2023 ）。三个面板分别对应左：填充的第3波段调谐（Weiß et al. , 2013 ），作为基线；中和右：基于第2波段的配置，使用WSU的8 GHz（基线）和14 GHz（目标）带宽。对于8 GHz设置，使用三次调谐覆盖107 GHz之间的连续范围，而对于14 GHz，两次调谐足以覆盖67至115 GHz之间的观测波长（Carpenter et al. , 2023 ）。与仅使用第3波段的策略相比，第2波段设置将可访问的红移空间扩展到更低红移，同时增加了检测到两条或更多谱线的源的比例，无需后续观测即可直接解决红移简并问题。第2波段在HerBS和SPT红移分布中均实现了更高的稳健红移比例。

figures.caption_en: Table 2: Assumed values of the ALMA receivers, current and in the WSU
figures.caption_zh: Table 2: ALMA接收器当前和WSU中的假定值

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: \color referee2 Observational efficiency comparison between ALMA Band 2 and Band 4 for a fiducial \(L_{\text{IR}}=10^{12}~L_{\odot}\) galaxy. The top panel shows the required on-source observing time to achieve a \(5\sigma\) detection for CO transitions across redshifts \(z=0-7\) , assuming line brightness conversions from Hagimoto et al. ( 2023 ) . The bottom panel shows the ratio of on-source observing time ( \(t_{\text{B2}}/t_{\text{B4}}\) ). A ratio below 1 indicates that Band 2 is more efficient. The black solid line quantifies the enhanced redshift coverage at lower frequencies, i.e., the d \(z_{Band2}\) /d \(z_{Band4}\) . The wide IF range of Band 2 allows for contiguous stacking, making it highly competitive for high-redshift line searches despite the required longer integrations compared to Band 4.
figures.caption_zh: Figure 5: \color referee2 对于假定的\(L_{\text{IR}}=10^{12}~L_{\odot}\)星系，ALMA第2波段和第4波段之间的观测效率比较。上图显示了在红移\(z=0-7\)范围内实现CO跃迁的\(5\sigma\)探测所需的源上观测时间，假设谱线亮度转换来自Hagimoto et al. ( 2023 )。下图显示了源上观测时间的比值（\(t_{\text{B2}}/t_{\text{B4}}\)）。比值低于1表示第2波段更高效。黑色实线量化了较低频率下增强的红移覆盖，即d \(z_{Band2}\) /d \(z_{Band4}\)。第2波段的宽IF范围允许连续堆叠，使其在高红移谱线搜索中极具竞争力，尽管与第4波段相比需要更长的积分时间。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: The equivalent width of an ALMA-detected spectral line can serve as a diagnostic, particularly in the WSU era. The velocity-integrated line flux compared to the adjacent dust continuum is much larger for [C ii ] 158 \(\mu{m}\) and [O iii ] 88 \(\mu{m}\) emission (Bakx et al. , 2024b ) , and thus blindly-found emission lines without associated dust continuum are likely from atomic fine-structure lines. Detections and upper-limits of emission line galaxies ( black squares and arrows ) are from Venemans et al. ( 2020 ) and Fudamoto et al. ( 2021 ) , while the filled regions are from scaling relations by De Looze et al. ( 2014 ) and Hagimoto et al. ( 2023 ) . The diagnostic capabilities of ALMA towards finding such line emitters will improve as larger bandwidths become available in the WSU era.
figures.caption_zh: Figure 6: ALMA探测到的谱线的等效宽度可作为诊断工具，特别是在WSU时代。与相邻尘埃连续谱相比，速度积分谱线流量对于[C ii] 158 \(\mu{m}\)和[O iii] 88 \(\mu{m}\)发射要大得多（Bakx et al. , 2024b ），因此盲目发现的、没有相关尘埃连续谱的发射线很可能来自原子精细结构谱线。发射线星系的探测和上限（黑色方块和箭头）来自Venemans et al. ( 2020 )和Fudamoto et al. ( 2021 )，而填充区域来自De Looze et al. ( 2014 )和Hagimoto et al. ( 2023 )的标度关系。随着WSU时代更大带宽的可用，ALMA寻找此类线发射体的诊断能力将得到提升。

title: The radial component of the local Galactic magnetic field in 3D
comment: 18 pages, 14 figures, accepted for publication in MNRAS
summary: We present a distance-resolved reconstruction of the local line-of-sight Galactic magnetic field, $B_{||}$, by combining a 3D electron density map, $n_e$, derived from dust-map-informed simulations, with a full-sky map of Faraday rotation measure (RM). Our forward model evaluates RM on the same 3D grid as the $n_e$ map and compares it to the Galactic Faraday rotation sky. We infer $B_{||}$ using a Gaussian-process prior whose power spectrum is inferred from the data with geometric variational inference. The result is a local map of $B_{||}$, with uncertainties, within 1.25 kpc for $b>5$ deg. The reconstructed RM sky reproduces prominent features of the Faraday rotation sky, with a root-mean-square average field strength of $1.63 \pm 0.16$ $μ$G. In face-on views, the magnetic field shows coherent patches with alternating sign and hints of kpc-scale modulations, together with significant structure on scales of order 100 pc. The reconstructed $B_{||}$ field has a 3D power spectrum with an average slope of $-2.73 \pm 0.19$. We validate the $B_{||}$ reconstruction using Galactic pulsars. Predicted RMs, computed by integrating $n_e B_{||}$ to each pulsar distance, correlate with observed RMs. Predicted dispersion measures from the $n_e$ map also correlate with measured DMs, although with significant scatter.

AI.tldr: 利用尘埃图模拟的3D电子密度图和全天法拉第旋转测量图，通过高斯过程先验和几何变分推断，重建了银河系局部视线方向磁场，获得了1.25 kpc范围内的磁场分布及其不确定性。
AI.motivation: 需要更精确地重建银河系局部视线方向磁场分布，以理解银河系磁场的结构和特性，验证现有磁场模型的准确性。
AI.method: 结合尘埃图模拟的3D电子密度图和全天法拉第旋转测量图，使用高斯过程先验和几何变分推断方法，在相同的3D网格上评估法拉第旋转并与观测比较，重建局部视线方向磁场。
AI.result: 获得了1.25 kpc范围内的局部磁场分布图，平均场强为1.63±0.16 μG，磁场呈现相干斑块和符号交替特征，3D功率谱平均斜率为-2.73±0.19，与银河系脉冲星观测数据有良好相关性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法成功重建了银河系局部视线方向磁场分布，揭示了磁场的多尺度结构特征，验证了重建结果的可靠性，为银河系磁场研究提供了新的工具和见解。

recommendation.reason: 该论文研究银河系局部磁场，属于银河系天文学范畴，与用户主要兴趣领域（强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学、高红移星系运动学、高红移偏振、高红移多相气体）无直接关联。虽然关键词中出现了'magnetic'和'dust'，但论文主题并非用户核心关注的高红移星系中的磁场或尘埃，而是银河系本地结构。论文方法（法拉第旋转、电子密度图）和核心作者均未出现在用户画像中。因此，相关性极低。
recommendation.topic_fit: 低。论文主题为银河系局部磁场，与用户主要兴趣（强引力透镜、高红移星系）不匹配。
recommendation.method_fit: 低。论文使用法拉第旋转测量和电子密度图重建磁场，并非用户常用的强引力透镜或高红移星系观测/模拟方法。
recommendation.author_fit: 无。论文作者均不在用户核心作者列表中。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 低。论文方法在银河系磁场研究中有一定新意，但与用户领域无关。
recommendation.negative_reason: 论文主题偏离用户核心兴趣领域（强引力透镜、高红移星系），属于银河系本地结构研究，且无方法或作者上的强关联。

artifacts.abstract_zh: We present a distance-resolved reconstruction of the local line-of-sight Galactic magnetic field, $B_{||}$, by combining a 3D electron density map, $n_e$, derived from dust-map-informed simulations, with a full-sky map of Faraday rotation measure (RM). Our forward model evaluates RM on the same 3D grid as the $n_e$ map and compares it to the Galactic Faraday rotation sky. We infer $B_{||}$ using a Gaussian-process prior whose power spectrum is inferred from the data with geometric variational inference. The result is a local map of $B_{||}$, with uncertainties, within 1.25 kpc for $b>5$ deg. The reconstructed RM sky reproduces prominent features of the Faraday rotation sky, with a root-mean-square average field strength of $1.63 \pm 0.16$ $μ$G. In face-on views, the magnetic field shows coherent patches with alternating sign and hints of kpc-scale modulations, together with significant structure on scales of order 100 pc. The reconstructed $B_{||}$ field has a 3D power spectrum with an average slope of $-2.73 \pm 0.19$. We validate the $B_{||}$ reconstruction using Galactic pulsars. Predicted RMs, computed by integrating $n_e B_{||}$ to each pulsar distance, correlate with observed RMs. Predicted dispersion measures from the $n_e$ map also correlate with measured DMs, although with significant scatter.
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 该方法成功重建了银河系局部视线方向磁场分布，揭示了磁场的多尺度结构特征，验证了重建结果的可靠性，为银河系磁场研究提供了新的工具和见解。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Selected slices through our reconstructed fields. These slices are one grid cell thick (approximately 10 pc). The left column shows the inferred structure of \(B_{||}\) , the second column shows slices of the relative standard deviation of \(B_{||}\) as determined from our 120 samples, third column shows the electron density structure used for our reconstruction, and the rightmost column shows the 3D structure of RM contributions. All slices are in the \(x-y\) plane, at Z-heights of \(500\) pc, \(250\) pc, \(-250\) pc and \(-500\) pc. Note that the \(B_{||}\) field is only showing the strength of \(B_{||}\) relative to the position of the sun, and that large values of \(B_{||}\) at high altitude have a significant component point in the \(z\) -axis as well as in the \(x-y\) plane.

Figure 2: Maps derived from our reconstructed magnetic field structure in Galactic coordinates centred at \((l,b)=(0^{\circ},0^{\circ})\) . Panel (a): the data-constrained extragalactic RM sky from H22 . Panel (b): our reconstruction of the RM sky from our inferred 3D structure of \(B_{||}\) and underlying 3D map of \(n_{e}\) . This map is derived from the mean \(B_{||}\) field from the posterior samples. Panel (c): the total uncertainty in the recovered map of RM, defined as the pixel-by-pixel standard deviation from each of the posterior samples of our reconstruction. This takes into account the underlying uncertainties in the H22 map, uncertainties in the form of samples from the Edenhofer et al. ( 2024b ) dust map, and sample variance originating from the differing draws from the posterior. Panel (d): the normalized residual sky as a difference in RM in our posterior mean sky map and the sky of H22 , normalized to the uncertainty in the reconstructed sky.

Figure 3: The mean reconstructed 3D field of \(n_{e}B_{||}\) integrated along the full \(z\) -axis of the reconstructed volume (excluding the \(|b| H22 RM map, minus the midplane behind the \(5^{\circ}\) mask. Some individual objects are labelled as in McCallum et al. ( 2025 ) , with the size and location of the Per-Tau shell from Bialy et al. ( 2021 ) . Note that this is not equivalent to the RM which would be observed through the Galactic disc from above, as the direction of the parallel component of the B-field is here still defined using a heliocentric observer. An animated version of this figure is available online as supplementary material, showing the posterior mean from each electron density sample.

Figure 4: The mean power spectrum of \(B_{||}\) from our posterior samples, with the filled region representing \(1\sigma\) . The mean average slope of the power spectrum is \(-2.73\pm 0.19\) . Also shown in black dashed lines are 10 samples from our prior.

Figure 5: Validation results using local pulsars from the ATNF Pulsar Catalogue (Manchester et al. , 2005 ) . Left panel shows the observed RM of each pulsar versus the RM predicted from the 3D GMF \(B_{||}\) reconstruction. The right panel shows the observed DM (scales only with \(n_{e}\) ) with the prediction from the underlying electron density map used as a fixed prior in our reconstruction. 1:1 match lines are shown on each panel. Observational uncertainties in RM and DM are negligible on the scales of these plots, so these error bars are not included.

Figure 6: Visualisation of our pulsar validation dataset projected along the 3 principal axes of the reconstructed volume. These pulsars are not included in the H22 reconstruction of the RM sky, or the 3D field of \(B_{||}\) . Diamonds represent pulsar positions, with their colour representing their observed RM. Lines show the integrated path to each pulsar, with line colours showing the reconstructed RM from our 3D reconstruction. The underlying images shows the z-integrated 3D reconstructed structure of \(n_{e}B_{||}\) .

Figure 7: Comparison of the face-on volume weighted mean field of \(B_{||}\) from UF24 (left panels), as well as our reconstruction both smoothed with a Gaussian kernel of width 100 pc as described in section 4.1 (centre column), and at full resolution (right panel). In all panels, we show the volume weighted mean magnetic field through the z-axis, with the Galactic centre lying on the y-axis to the right. The top row shows the \(B_{||}\) field averaged above the midplane to a height of \(z=500~pc\) , and the bottom panels show the average from the midplane to \(z=-500~pc\) . In all panels, only cells above our \(|b|<5^{\circ}\) mask are included in the average.
